page_title: Gainax Print Software Series Vol.1 Neon Genesis Evangelion
text:
is a print software that allows you to select and design your favorite illustrations from more than 200 illustrations of Neon Genesis Evangelion. It contains a large number of format designs that can be used for various purposes such as New Year's cards, cards, business cards, invitations, and stickers. https://web.archive.org/web/20060530044612/http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=408&genre=40_software&page=&key=&8%A1%E04=2%A1%DE0
